# Chapter 29 Reprinting Work Orders

Work orders can be reprinted for machines pending retirement or being moved. The reprint function supports filtering to locate specific work orders.

## 29.1 Reprinting a Work Order

To reprint a work order, the following filter criteria are available:

| Filter | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| Date | Filter by work order date |
| User Scope | Show work orders for all users or only the active user |
| Work Order Type | Filter by type of work order (from predefined list) |
| Machine Numbers | Filter by specific machine number(s); multiple machines can be selected |

After applying filters, the matching work orders are displayed. One or more work orders can be selected for reprinting.
